Title: User successfully logs in
Preconditions: User is not logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid email and password in the login form.
2. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the HomeActivity.

Title: User fails to log in with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User is not logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid email and password in the login form.
2. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating incorrect credentials.

Title: User successfully creates a family
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: Valid family details (email, FamilyCode, Nome, pictureurl).
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the JoinFamilyActivity.
2. Enter valid family details.
3. Click on the create family button.
Expected Result: Family is created successfully and user is redirected to the FamilyActivity.

Title: User fails to create a family with invalid details
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the JoinFamilyActivity.
2. Enter invalid family details.
3. Click on the create family button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid family details.

Title: User generates a code in FamilyActivity
Preconditions: User is logged in and in FamilyActivity.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the FamilyActivity.
2. Click on the generate code button.
Expected Result: A code is generated and displayed.

Title: User navigates through the monitoring section
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Access the footer menu.
2. Navigate to the monitoring section.
3. Take notes.
4. Return to the home page.
Expected Result: User returns to the home page after taking notes.

Title: User takes a note and returns to the home page
Preconditions: User is logged in and in NoteFragment.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the NoteFragment.
2. Take a note.
3. Return to the home page.
Expected Result: User returns to the home page after taking a note.

Title: User navigates to different fragments in HomeActivity
Preconditions: User is logged in and in HomeActivity.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the HomeFragment.
2. Navigate to the MonitorFragment.
3. Navigate to the NoteFragment.
Expected Result: User is able to navigate between different fragments in HomeActivity.

Title: User accesses the profile screen
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Access the profile screen.
2. View the graphs (Sleep, Nutrition, Growth).
Expected Result: User is able to view the graphs in the profile screen.

Title: User views the sleep graph
Preconditions: User is logged in and in ProfileActivity.
Test Steps:
1. Access the profile screen.
2. Navigate to the Sleep graph.
Expected Result: User is able to view the sleep graph.

Title: User views the nutrition graph
Preconditions: User is logged in and in ProfileActivity.
Test Steps:
1. Access the profile screen.
2. Navigate to the Nutrition graph.
Expected Result: User is able to view the nutrition graph.

Title: User views the growth graph
Preconditions: User is logged in and in ProfileActivity.
Test Steps:
1. Access the profile screen.
2. Navigate to the Growth graph.
Expected Result: User is able to view the growth graph.

Title: User navigates to allattamento
Preconditions: User is logged in and in Aggiungi campo.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Aggiungi campo.
2. Navigate to Allattamento.
Expected Result: User is able to navigate to Allattamento.

Title: User navigates to add document
Preconditions: User is logged in and in Arriva raccolta.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Arriva raccolta.
2. Navigate to Aggiungi documento.
Expected Result: User is able to navigate to Aggiungi documento.

Title: User navigates to add field
Preconditions: User is logged in and in Aggiungi documento.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Aggiungi documento.
2. Navigate to Aggiungi campo.
Expected Result: User is able to navigate to Aggiungi campo.

Title: User returns to home from any fragment
Preconditions: User is in any fragment of HomeActivity.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to any fragment in HomeActivity.
2. Return to the home page.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page.

Title: User attempts to log in with an empty email and password
Preconditions: User is not logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Enter empty email and password in the login form.
2. Click on the login button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating empty fields.

Title: User attempts to create a family with an empty email
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: Empty email, valid FamilyCode, Nome, and pictureurl.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the JoinFamilyActivity.
2. Enter empty email and valid FamilyCode, Nome, and pictureurl.
3. Click on the create family button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating empty email.

Title: User attempts to create a family with an empty FamilyCode
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: Valid email, empty FamilyCode, Nome, and pictureurl.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the JoinFamilyActivity.
2. Enter valid email, empty FamilyCode, Nome, and pictureurl.
3. Click on the create family button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating empty FamilyCode.

Title: User attempts to create a family with an empty Nome
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: Valid email, valid FamilyCode, empty Nome, and pictureurl.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the JoinFamilyActivity.
2. Enter valid email, valid FamilyCode, empty Nome, and pictureurl.
3. Click on the create family button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating empty Nome.

Title: User attempts to create a family with an empty pictureurl
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: Valid email, valid FamilyCode, valid Nome, empty pictureurl.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the JoinFamilyActivity.
2. Enter valid email, valid FamilyCode, valid Nome, and empty pictureurl.
3. Click on the create family button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating empty pictureurl.

Title: User takes an empty note
Preconditions: User is logged in and in NoteFragment.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the NoteFragment.
2. Take an empty note.
3. Return to the home page.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating empty note.

Title: User views a graph with no data
Preconditions: User is logged in and in ProfileActivity.
Test Steps:
1. Access the profile screen.
2. Navigate to the Sleep graph.
3. Check if the graph is empty.
4. Navigate to the Nutrition graph.
5. Check if the graph is empty.
6. Navigate to the Growth graph.
7. Check if the graph is empty.
Expected Result: The graph displays no data when there is no recorded information.

Title: User views a graph with invalid data
Preconditions: User is logged in and in ProfileActivity.
Test Steps:
1. Access the profile screen.
2. Navigate to the Sleep graph.
3. Enter an invalid date or format.
4. Check if the graph displays an error message.
5. Navigate to the Nutrition graph.
6. Enter an invalid date or format.
7. Check if the graph displays an error message.
8. Navigate to the Growth graph.
9. Enter an invalid date or format.
10. Check if the graph displays an error message.
Expected Result: The graph displays an error message when invalid data is entered.

Title: User attempts to generate a code with an invalid input
Preconditions: User is logged in and in FamilyActivity.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the FamilyActivity.
2. Enter an invalid input.
3. Click on the generate code button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid input.

Title: User attempts to create a family with an existing FamilyCode
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the JoinFamilyActivity.
2. Enter an existing FamilyCode.
3. Click on the create family button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the FamilyCode already exists.

Title: User attempts to create a family with a non-numeric FamilyCode
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the JoinFamilyActivity.
2. Enter a non-numeric FamilyCode.
3. Click on the create family button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the FamilyCode should be numeric.

Title: User attempts to create a family with a numeric FamilyCode but missing other details
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: Numeric FamilyCode, missing Nome and pictureurl.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the JoinFamilyActivity.
2. Enter a numeric FamilyCode, missing Nome and pictureurl.
3. Click on the create family button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating missing details.
